title: Start register output value inconsistent with the other simulators

features.name: always_ff with non-blocking assignment and no explicit initial value
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block with non-blocking assignment to a register that has no explicit initial value assignment
features.snippet: reg r_; always_ff @(posedge clk) if (!rst) r_ <= 1'b1; else r_ <= data;

features.name: reset condition determining initial register value in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block where the reset signal condition determines the initial value of a register at simulation startup
